creator: seggers@semyam.dinoco.de
text:
Starting from the "RUNNING VINUM" section of vinum(4) the bold
and non-bold parts of the man page are reversed.

Fix: 

(From the man page source:)

: functionality, which is available from Cybernet Systems
: Inc. (\f(CWhttp://www.cybernet.com\fP).
                                    ^^^
	Here bold starts.  My suspicion is that the code at this point
in the man page is wrong.  Don't know enough, yet to say how to fix it.

: .Sh RUNNING VINUM
: The freely available version of the
How-To-Repeat: 
	Read the man page and note which parts are bold.
